title: Test1
author: Qtoon Originals
description: In a world where an ancient iron veil separates the mortal realm from the divine, a young blacksmith's apprentice discovers she can pierce the barrier with her bare hands. As dark forces gather on both sides of the veil, she must master her mysterious power before both worlds are consumed by shadow.

title: Neon Samurai
author: Kira Studios
description: In Neo-Tokyo 2145, a disgraced samurai warrior wields a plasma katana against a corrupt mega-corporation that has enslaved the city's underclass. His path to redemption is paved with neon lights and the blood of corporate soldiers.

title: Moonlit Garden
author: Hana Arts
description: A florist who can see the true feelings of people through the flowers they choose meets a mysterious man who always requests black roses. Their unlikely romance blooms in a garden that only appears under the full moon.

title: Void Hunters
author: Apex Comics
description: A ragtag crew of intergalactic bounty hunters takes on an impossible mission to capture a being made of pure void energy. Their journey takes them to the edge of the known universe and beyond.

title: Spirit Chronicles
author: Qtoon Originals
description: After being struck by lightning, a high school student gains the ability to communicate with ancient spirits. Now she must balance her normal life with her new role as a mediator between the spirit world and the living.

title: Last Stand Dojo
author: Sensei Works
description: The last traditional martial arts dojo in a city overrun by augmented fighters struggles to survive. A young prodigy must prove that ancient techniques can overcome modern enhancements in the ultimate tournament.

title: Crimson Tide
author: Wave Studios
description: A coastal town is plagued by a mysterious red tide that transforms its citizens at night. A marine biologist and a local detective race to uncover the truth before the entire population is consumed.

title: Celestial Throne
author: Dynasty Arts
description: In an ancient empire ruled by god-emperors, a palace maid discovers she is the reincarnation of the very goddess the emperor worships. As she awakens her divine powers, court intrigue and heavenly politics collide.

title: The Clockmaker's Whisper
author: Copilot Test
description: A reclusive clockmaker discovers a pocket watch that records moments from the future. As he listens, time itself begins to unravel in his small town.
